test_output_summary: 132 passed, 4 skipped in 1.98s (4 skipped are @pytest.mark.integration requiring live Graphiti)
implementation_notes: Implemented bounded asyncio.gather parallelism for episode seeding within groups. Key changes: (1) Added max_concurrent_episodes field (default=3, range 1-10) to GraphitiSettings dataclass in config.py with full validation, YAML field_types, and env override MAX_CONCURRENT_EPISODES. (2) Added max_concurrent_episodes field (default=3, range >=1) to frozen GraphitiConfig dataclass with type/value validation. (3) Extended _is_transient_error() to detect rate limit errors (429, Rate limit, rate_limit, Too Many Requests). (4) Updated _create_episode() retry backoff to use longer delays (4s/8s) for rate limit errors vs standard (2s/4s) for other transient errors. (5) Added import asyncio to template_sync.py. (6) Added _sync_items_parallel() helper function using asyncio.Semaphore for bounded concurrency with return_exceptions=True in gather. (7) Replaced sequential agent and rule loops in sync_template_to_graphiti() with parallel versions using _sync_items_parallel(). Max concurrent value is safely extracted from client.config.max_concurrent_episodes with isinstance guard to handle AsyncMock in tests. (8) Added max_concurrent_episodes: 3 to .guardkit/graphiti.yaml with documentation comments. No asyncio.Lock added (not needed for single-threaded asyncio). project_seeding.py was NOT modified.
